introSection: Plohseidon is a steel family roller coaster located at Freizeitpark Plohn in Lengenfeld, Saxony, Germany. When it first opened in 2011, it was called Familienachterbahn (German for Family Roller Coaster).

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Red track, blue supports. This roller coaster has an extra section at the start where the train passes some scenery slowly.

fullText:
Plohseidon is a steel family roller coaster located at Freizeitpark Plohn in Lengenfeld, Saxony, Germany. When it first opened in 2011, it was called Familienachterbahn (German for Family Roller Coaster).

Red track, blue supports. This roller coaster has an extra section at the start where the train passes some scenery slowly.
